cast.name: 亚历山大·德雷蒙 Alexander Dreymon
亚历山大·芬农 Alexander E. Fennon

introduction: Together Kaj and Katharina take revenge on the world and all who tortured them before. After a therapy session Kaj meets the young Katharina. Unknowingly, she succeeds in gaining access to Kaj's alienated psyche, which his therapist has been denied so far. In the records of his daydreams she finds a common component of her past. This provides the reason to finally put his ideas into reality. It allows them to bring their lives back into balance
